tasks.label: run-backend-h2
tasks.command: cd backend ; set APP_DB_PROFILE=h2 ; mvnw.cmd spring-boot:run

tasks.label: check-java-proc
tasks.command: Get-Process java -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 5 Id, ProcessName, StartTime

tasks.label: check-port-8080
tasks.command: Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,OwningProcess,State ; if($?) { Get-Process -Id (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess) -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,ProcessName,Path }

tasks.label: check-port-5173
tasks.command: Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress,LocalPort,OwningProcess,State ; if($?) { Get-Process -Id (Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5173 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty OwningProcess) -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,ProcessName,Path }
